---
title: "Course"
subtitle: "Dummy content for the second MVP page"
---

This page is a placeholder for course material. The goal is to establish the page pattern before writing the real curriculum.

## Module 1

Learners start with a short introduction to the working environment and the core concepts for the course.

### Learning goals

- Describe the purpose of the project
- Navigate the course website
- Run a small reproducible example

## Module 2

This section can later hold exercises, walkthroughs, slides, or links to notebooks.

Example placeholder:

``` text
Replace this block with a real exercise once the first module is drafted.
```

## Next steps

Replace this dummy content with the first real lesson outline, then split additional material into new pages as the structure becomes clearer.

| Col1 | Col2 | Col3 |
|------|------|------|
|      |      |      |
|      |      |      |
|      |      |      |
